description_long: This is a rectangular wooden storage box with slatted sides and a solid front and back panel. The front and back panels each feature a large, horizontal, oval-shaped cutout that serves as a hand grip for easy carrying. The wood has a natural, slightly weathered finish, with visible grain and some minor surface imperfections, giving it a rustic appearance. The sides are constructed from four horizontal wooden slats, fastened together with visible dark screws or nails at the ends. The box is open at the top, allowing for easy access to its contents, and the interior is spacious and unobstructed. This type of box is commonly used for storage or transport of goods in urban environments such as markets, garages, or workshops.
description: A rustic, rectangular wooden storage box with slatted sides and oval hand grips on the front and back. The box is open-topped and features a natural, weathered wood finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing a solid wooden panel with a large oval hand grip cutout.
description_view_1: Side view displaying four horizontal wooden slats fastened together, with no hand grip cutout.
description_view_2: Back view identical to the front, with a solid panel and oval hand grip cutout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing four horizontal wooden slats without a hand grip.
attribute_handle_design: front and back recessed oval hand grips
